text_block_list.text:
On the way to my office, I hear lively<n>chatter from
inside the gym. When I<n>step inside to see what's
going on...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Nice shot! Let's get another one in!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Their point guard is on the move! I'll<n>mark 'em!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The tournament finals... Team Takex,<n>the
previous champions, have easily<n>dealt with all
their competition.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I wonder how much of a challenge<n>Ryan's team,
the Norries, are posing<n>for them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I can hardly breathe! Thisis far too exhilarating!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Now, now. Take a moment to calm<n>your nerves.
The Mejiro family<n>always act with grace, do we
not?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: At any rate...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Woo! Great cut, Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Go for it, Ryan! You're the coolest!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Their cheers are relentless... Ryan is<n>popular as
ever.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Then we shall be just as relentless!<n>Shoot, Ryan!
Dunk it!

The game progresses until the final<n>buzzer is
about to ring.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
If Ryan clinches this free throw, her<n>team will turn
the tables in their favor...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Goodness me... I'm a nervous wreck<n>just
watching.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: You've got this, Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Make that basket swish!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'd like to join in on the cheering...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: But I fear it would only add to the<n>pressure...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Thanks, everyone!
She makes her shot, and...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Wooow! That was amazing, Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Referee
text_block_list.text: That's game! The Norries win the<n>championship!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yesss, we did it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So, um, I'd just like to thank you all<n>for rooting
me on!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I really felt your support for thereal me. It gave me the strengthto give it my all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I'll keep on being the best me I can!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: You were just too cool!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
You're so cool and dedicated—I'm<n>never gonna
stop cheering for you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
She didn't let the cheers pressure<n>her, but rather
used them as support<n>to clench the win. Ryan
really is as<n>cool as they say.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe, indeed.
